---
title: "NFL Graphs - C"
author: "Chandler"
date: "2024-12-03"
output: pdf_document
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
#Load the appropriate libraries:
library(ggplot2)
library(tidymodels)
library(tidyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(glmnet)
library(kknn)
library(caret)
library(kernlab)
#library(nflplotR)
```


```{r rds-file-read}
svm_model_info <- readRDS("SVM Model Info by Team.rds")
```


```{r svm-df-building}
svm_data <- data.frame(team = unique(svm_model_info$nfl_team),
                       pass_1 = -1, pass_0 = -1, run_1 = -1, run_0 = -1,
                       mn_pvalue = 1, acc_pvalue = 1, 
                       bye_week = 0, train_error = 0, num_vec = 0,
                       spec = 0, sens = 0, pos_pred = 0, neg_pred = 0,
                       pos_class = "")

for(i in c(1:4)){
  team <- svm_data$team[i]
  
  svm_data$pass_1[i] <- svm_model_info$conf_mat[[match(team, svm_model_info$nfl_team)]]$table[1,1]
  svm_data$pass_0[i] <- svm_model_info$conf_mat[[match(team, svm_model_info$nfl_team)]]$table[2,1]
  svm_data$run_1[i] <- svm_model_info$conf_mat[[match(team, svm_model_info$nfl_team)]]$table[2,2]
  svm_data$run_0[i] <- svm_model_info$conf_mat[[match(team, svm_model_info$nfl_team)]]$table[1,2]
  
  svm_data$mn_pvalue[i] <- svm_model_info$conf_mat[[match(team, svm_model_info$nfl_team)]]$overall[7]
  
  svm_data$acc_pvalue[i] <- svm_model_info$conf_mat[[match(team, svm_model_info$nfl_team)]]$overall[6]
  
  svm_data$sens[i] <- svm_model_info$conf_mat[[match(team, svm_model_info$nfl_team)]]$byClass[1]
  svm_data$spec[i] <- svm_model_info$conf_mat[[match(team, svm_model_info$nfl_team)]]$byClass[2]
  svm_data$pos_pred[i] <- svm_model_info$conf_mat[[match(team, svm_model_info$nfl_team)]]$byClass[3]
  svm_data$neg_pred[i] <- svm_model_info$conf_mat[[match(team, svm_model_info$nfl_team)]]$byClass[4]
  
  svm_data$pos_class[i] <- svm_model_info$conf_mat[[match(team, svm_model_info$nfl_team)]]$positive
  
  svm_data$bye_week[i] <- svm_model_info$bye_week[[match(team, svm_model_info$nfl_team)]]
  
  temp <- svm_model_info$model[[match(team, svm_model_info$nfl_team)]] %>% extract_fit_parsnip() %>% .$fit
  
  svm_data$train_error[i] <- temp@error
  
  svm_data$num_vec[i] <- temp@nSV
}

```



```{r run-pass-pred}
svm_data_test %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = sens, y = spec)) +
  geom_nfl_logos(aes(team_abbr = team))

```
